description: In the WordPress admin panel, create a hierarchical navigation menu named 'Main Navigation' and assign it to the Primary menu location. The menu must follow this structure: 'Home' (Custom Link to http://localhost/), 'About Us' (Page), 'Our Products' (Custom Link to #), 'Cakes' (Page, nested as a sub-item under 'Our Products'), 'Pastries' (Page, nested as a sub-item under 'Our Products'), 'Blog' (Page), and 'Contact' (Page).
